title: After the Takamatsunomiya Kinen: New Me, New Dreams

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
There are still some things I want to work on, but I
get a good result! I'm sure I can improve even
more.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
After some discussion with Trainer, we decide
that I should run in the Milers Cup next.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
If I keep doing well in races, Trainer might even
get an award from the URA! Hehe. I have a new
dream now... ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'll be running against Zephyr again in my next
race. She's hit a wall in terms of race distance and
is struggling to overcome it. I'm worried about
her...
